tasks.phaseName: Chunk A — Platform correctness & DX foundation
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [A] Single-instance lock + second-instance focus
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk A / A1. `app.requestSingleInstanceLock()` before ready-work in `src/main/index.ts`; deny → `app.quit()` with no server spawn. `second-instance` → restore-if-minimized + focus main window. Tests with mocked electron.

tasks.phaseName: Chunk A — Platform correctness & DX foundation
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [A] Window-state multi-display clamp + debounced save
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk A / A2. Validate persisted bounds against screen.getAllDisplays() workAreas (≥100px visible both axes, else center on primary, size clamped). Debounced (~500ms) save on resize/move plus save-on-close. Keep maximize special-case. Unit tests: off-screen fallback, partial-visible kept, maximize round-trip, debounce coalescing.

tasks.phaseName: Chunk A — Platform correctness & DX foundation
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [A] ESLint config + lint script for apps/desktop
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk A / A3. Add eslint.config.js + "lint" script modeled on apps/server (@dorkos/eslint-config, TSDoc rules). Fix all violations incl. dead mainWindow param in menu.ts. `pnpm --filter @dorkos/desktop lint` green, picked up by turbo.

tasks.phaseName: Chunk A — Platform correctness & DX foundation
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [A] Vitest harness + electron mock for main-process tests
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk A / A4. vitest.config.ts + "test" script in apps/desktop; shared electron mock (app, BrowserWindow, screen, dialog, Menu). Houses A1/A2 tests; B–D reuse. Wired into turbo test.

tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [B] Rebuild menu on convenience roles + Settings/Updates/Help items
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk B / B1. Top level: custom app menu, editMenu/viewMenu/windowMenu roles, custom Help. App menu: about · Check for Updates… (disabled when !app.isPackaged; wired to C) · Settings… Cmd+, (navigate IPC) · services · hide group · quit. Help: Documentation, Report an Issue, dorkos.ai. Shape-asserting unit test.

tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [B] navigate IPC channel: preload onNavigate + client subscription
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk B / B2, ADR 260709-210223. Main→renderer channel `navigate`; preload exposes onNavigate(cb) returning unsubscribe; client app shell subscribes when electronAPI present and forwards to TanStack Router. Verify actual settings route (commit 474750ac) and target it from the menu. RTL test for subscription + unsubscribe.

tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [B] Custom About panel via setAboutPanelOptions
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk B / B3. app.setAboutPanelOptions with name, app.getVersion(), copyright, one-line credits (writing-for-humans voice). Unit test asserts options.

tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [B] Dock menu
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk B / B4. app.dock.setMenu with Show DorkOS (show/create window). Unit test asserts dock menu set on darwin.

tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [C] Wire auto-updater gated on app.isPackaged + background cadence
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk C / C1. Remove commented-out call in index.ts; setupAutoUpdater() internally no-ops when !app.isPackaged. checkForUpdatesAndNotify on launch + unref'd 4h interval. electron-log as autoUpdater.logger; autoInstallOnAppQuit true.

tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [C] checkForUpdatesInteractive with full state dialogs
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk C / C2. Menu-triggered check: up-to-date dialog (interactive only), download → Restart Now/Later dialog → quitAndInstall; interactive errors dialog, background errors log-only. Unit tests with mocked electron-updater: 4 specified cases.

tasks.phaseName: Chunk D — App identity & deep links
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [D] Identity metadata: copyright, description/author, privacy-string investigation
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk D / D1. electron-builder.yml copyright; package.json description/author. Investigate stripping unused default privacy usage strings via extendInfo — apply only if cleanly supported, else document in PR.

tasks.phaseName: Chunk D — App identity & deep links
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [D] dorkos:// deep links: protocol registration + open-url → navigate
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk D / D2, ADR 260709-210223. mac.protocols scheme dorkos; setAsDefaultProtocolClient at startup; open-url → focus/create window + parse dorkos://<path> → navigate IPC. Malformed → focus only. Unit tests for URL→route parsing incl. junk. Manual packaged-build QA noted in PR.

tasks.phaseName: Chunk D — App identity & deep links
tasks.subject: [desktop-macos-polish] [D] Document icon.svg → icon.icns regeneration
tasks.description: Spec §Chunk D / D3. Document the regeneration path (build/README.md or package script). No automation required.
